title: oberonia mannii
intro: Oberonia mannii is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in the countries of India and Myanmar. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include being used to treat fever, cough, and other respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oberonia mannii include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and cough, and its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Oberonia mannii is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of Asia.
